0.response: {"Q0":"I just tried to go for the universe that was more likely to give me a better chance at winning some money and the other strategy I used was obviously not digging on yellow planet and when red planet astronaut was gone I focused on just blue planet as well."}

7.response: {"Q0":"The higher percentage of chance to get that reward."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Nope it seemed very easy to understand"}

1.response: {"Q0":"Not really. I felt like I was consistent throughout the whole game using the strategy I did."}

5.response: {"Q0":"No. I think I did dig maybe like 2 or 3 times on the planet but I didn't dig on the planet for the most part."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I think maybe 65% chance I would find a gem."}

6.response: {"Q0":"No I did not because I knew I would waste my gold if I did."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I think I focused on both equally. But I felt like the most reward was going to be coming from the galaxy part so I tried to make sure I didn't miss it especially because I only had 1 second to choose."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes and I made sure to avoid that planet and gem thereafter."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Absolutely. I chose to avoid that color planet and gem after he left."}

11.response: {"Q0":"This was very fun and I would love to do this again. Thank you!"}
